common.openLinkInBrowser: If you want to open the link in a different browser than your default one, copy and paste this link:

emailVerification.body:
Hey,
please click the link below to verify this new email address.
emailVerification.subject: Verify your email

forgotPassword.body:
Hey,
you requested a password reset.

Click the button below to reset your password.
forgotPassword.subject: Reset your password

magicLink.body:
Hey,
you requested a login email from supastarter.

Click the link below to login.
magicLink.subject: Login to supastarter

newUser.body:
Hey,
thanks for signing up for supastarter.

To start using our app, please confirm your email address by clicking the link below.
newUser.subject: Confirm your email

organizationInvitation.body: You have been invited to join the organization {organizationName}. Click the button below or copy and paste the link into your browser of choice to accept the invitation and join the organization.
organizationInvitation.headline: Join the organization {organizationName}
organizationInvitation.subject: You have been invited to join an organization

dripDay0.body: Welcome to AACsearch! You've taken the first step toward bringing powerful search to your platform. We're excited to have you on board.
dripDay0.whatsNext: Here's your quickstart plan to get up and running in minutes:
dripDay0.step4: 4. Generate an API key and start integrating
dripDay0.subject: Welcome to AACsearch — get started in minutes!

dripDay1.body: Ready to create your first search collection? It's the foundation of everything you'll build with AACsearch. Watch our quick tutorial to see how easy it is.
dripDay1.subject: How to create your first search collection

dripDay3.body: Did you know you can connect AACsearch directly to your CMS, e-commerce platform, or any data source? Our connectors make it seamless.
dripDay3.supported: Currently supported: PrestaShop, Bitrix24, and direct API integration.
dripDay3.benefit2: ✓ Real-time updates — your search stays fresh
dripDay3.subject: Connect your CMS to AACsearch

dripDay7.body: Here are some tips to get the most out of AACsearch:
dripDay7.tip1: 🔍 Synonyms — define synonyms so your users find what they need even with different wording
dripDay7.tip2: ⭐ Curations — pin important results to the top for key searches
dripDay7.tip3: ⚡ Relevance tuning — adjust ranking to match your content type
dripDay7.subject: Tips: get more from your AACsearch

dripDay14.body: Two weeks in — we hope you're enjoying AACsearch! Here's how other teams are transforming their search experience.
dripDay14.teaser: Read our latest case study to see how a similar platform improved search relevance by 40% and reduced support tickets by 25%.
dripDay14.subject: How teams like yours use AACsearch

dripDay21.body: You've been exploring AACsearch for three weeks. Ready to unlock the full potential? Upgrading gives you:
dripDay21.benefit1: 🚀 Higher search volumes and faster response times
dripDay21.subject: Unlock more with AACsearch

notification.openInApp: Open this notification in the app:
notification.subject: New notification
